title: Ant Control in Larchmont, Westchester | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional ant control services in Larchmont, Westchester. Trusted ant extermination for homes and businesses. Same-day service available. Call now for a free quote!
intro: Dealing with an ant infestation in your Larchmont home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive ant control services tailored to the unique needs of Westchester properties. Our experienced technicians use safe, effective treatments to eliminate ant colonies and prevent future invasions in Larchmont's beautiful residential neighborhoods.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Larchmont and the greater Westchester area for years, with a deep understanding of the specific ant species common to this region. Our licensed exterminators provide customized treatment plans, eco-friendly solutions, and guaranteed results to keep your property ant-free year-round.
localContext: Larchmont's tree-lined streets, historic homes, and proximity to Long Island Sound create ideal conditions for various ant species, including carpenter ants, pavement ants, and odorous house ants. From Manor Park estates to properties near Larchmont Manor Beach Club, we protect homes and businesses throughout this charming village with targeted ant control solutions.

faqs.question: How much does ant control cost in Larchmont?
faqs.answer: Ant control services in Larchmont typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and type of ant species. We provide free inspections and transparent pricing before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Larchmont homes?
faqs.answer: Larchmont residents most frequently encounter carpenter ants, pavement ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning as they can damage wooden structures in older homes. Our technicians identify the specific species to apply the most effective treatment method.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to ant problems in Larchmont?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for ant control in Larchmont and throughout Westchester County. Our rapid response team understands that ant infestations can escalate quickly, especially during warmer months, and we prioritize getting your property treated promptly.

faqs.question: Are your ant control treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and eco-friendly treatment options that are safe for families and pets when applied correctly. Our technicians take extra precautions in homes with children and animals, and we provide clear instructions on any necessary waiting periods before re-entering treated areas.
